# Fraud Prevention in Ecommerce Report 2023-2024: Sift’s contribution

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift’s contribution to the latest edition of the Fraud Prevention in Ecommerce Report from The Paypers details the global state of the fraud ecosystem and how deploying the best fraud prevention techniques can deter fraudsters and scammers.

Download Sift’s contribution to the Fraud Prevention in Ecommerce Report 2023-2024 from The Paypers to discover:

*   How to keep fraudsters out while balancing a seamless customer UX
*   The most prevalent types of fraud and new trends in fraud to watch out for in 2024
*   Specific industries or sectors that are more vulnerable to ATO attacks
*   How businesses can successfully shut down account takeovers and evolve fraud operations to meet the pace of a dynamic global market

### Download the Report

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
